# datadog_org_group_policies (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve the policies attached to an org group, optionally filtered by policy name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List every policy attached to the given org group.
data "datadog_org_group_policies" "all" {
  org_group_id = "019d97e8-74d4-7060-806e-e731c8f1d005"
}

# Or look up a specific policy by name to reference its ID elsewhere.
data "datadog_org_group_policies" "widget_copy_paste" {
  org_group_id = "019d97e8-74d4-7060-806e-e731c8f1d005"
  policy_name  = "is_widget_copy_paste_enabled"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_group_id` (String) The UUID of the org group whose policies to list.

### Optional

- `policy_name` (String) Filter policies by name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policies` (List of Object) The list of policies. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String)
- `enforcement_tier` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `org_group_id` (String)
- `policy_name` (String)
- `policy_type` (String)
